bio: I'm a full-stack developer and software architect at <sudalys>Sudalys</sudalys>, where I build and maintain web and mobile applications, develop SSO systems, and manage CI/CD pipelines.
I'm passionate about clean architecture, developer experience, and turning complex problems into elegant solutions. I also love to learn and try new things.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Where I've worked and what I've built.

items.description: Building web applications with PHP Symfony and mobile apps with Flutter. Developed a single sign-on system and managing DevOps workflows and CI/CD pipelines.
Developed web applications using PHP Symfony. Handled DevOps tasks including deployment automation and environment management.
Built and maintained web applications using C# and ASP.NET across two engagements, contributing to both new features and existing codebase improvements.
Developed web solutions using PHP Symfony for backend logic and Angular for the front-end interface.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built.

items.title: RH-Proo
items.description: An HR management platform with a Svelte frontend and a TypeScript backend, containerized with Docker.

items.title: Season Watch
items.description: An app that allow every citizen to contribute on scientific research on climate change.

items.title: Valentine's Surprise
items.description: A playful JavaFX app with animated buttons and dynamic GIFs — a fun interactive way to ask a very important question.

items.title: RPG Platformer
items.description: A 2D die-and-retry platformer RPG built in Java, featuring leveling, abilities, equipment, and boss fights.
